en.atmosphere: Suburban Chofu on Keio line. Bedroom-town quiet, zero bars or clubs.
en.landmarks: Nearby farmland patches. Residential corridors, nothing notable.
en.food: Scarce. Small noodle shops, convenience stores. Eating out rare.

ja.atmosphere: 調布市の寝台地。Keio沿い。飲み屋ゼロ。
ja.landmarks: 近くに農地。住宅街のみ。
ja.food: 少ない。蕎麦屋、コンビニ程度。

ru.atmosphere: Спальный пригород Чофу. Keio line. Барам нет.
